scripts.lint: oxlint package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.e2e.json playwright.config.ts scripts e2e api packages web --deny-warnings
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.e2e.json playwright.config.ts scripts e2e api packages web
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.e2e.json playwright.config.ts scripts e2e api packages web
